segment.source: Centered hero with optional badge, large headline, lead subheadline, an embedded newsletter form rendered via the TYPO3 Form Framework, and a small privacy note underneath. Use it for: landing or campaign openers whose primary goal is an email address — newsletter invitations, sign-up pitches with a consent line. Prefer 'Startup Waitlist Hero' when the source adds avatars or user-count proof; 'Newsletter Signup' for sign-up sections further down the page.
